injection_notes.prepend_not_append: Runtime block goes at the TOP of CLAUDE.md so it's read first
injection_notes.backup_before_modify: Always create a timestamped backup before changing any file
injection_notes.skip_if_already_injected: Idempotent — if markers are present, don't inject again
injection_notes.create_if_missing: If a repo has no CLAUDE.md, create one with just the runtime block
